2326640.name: Timeless Tesseract
2326640.description:
Introducing Timeless Tesseract - The First 3D Parkour Platformer That Lets You Control Time.

Are You Ready To Experience The Thrill Of Manipulating Time In A Way Never Before Seen In A Video Game? Don't Miss Out On The Chance To Be Part Of History.
Play Timeless Tesseract Today And Immerse Yourself In The Ultimate Time-Bending Adventure!

With The Power Of Time Cubes, You Can Manipulate Time Like Never Before And Reach Your Objective - The Almighty Cube. But That's Not All! Timeless Tesseract Offers Five Unique Levels, Each With Its Own Theme, Colour, And Difficulty Level. And With The Ability To Control And Rewind Time, You Can Overcome Obstacles, Solve Puzzles, And Make Your Way To The Finish Line Like A True Time Traveller.

Game By Captain Tesseract
Music By Deb V.C. | @debv.c
Trailer Music By Siddharth | @vilkristproductions
2326640.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
